title: Dirt = Diamonds
description: any type of dirt = 64 diamond blocks
body:
dirt is **op** :D

This datapack adds craftable diamond blocks using dirt, any type of dirt can be used. 
This datapack works in version 1.21.9 - 1.21.10. This datapack may or may not work in versions below 1.21.9

FARMLAND AND DIRT PATH BLOCK DOES NOT CRAFT ANY DIAMONDS

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3f77740e72af49c2f3700b1a5ae980e0a206490.png)
